title: Looking for Teacher at IIT Madras International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at IIT Madras International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? IIT Madras International Enterprises in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Madras International Enterprises:
IIT Madras International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras International Enterprises!
